de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree

Class ProofTreeViewFilter.NodeFilter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree.ProofTreeViewFilter
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree.ProofTreeViewFilter.NodeFilter
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ProofTreeViewFilter.HideIntermediateFilter, ProofTreeViewFilter.OnlyInteractiveFilter
    Enclosing class:
    ProofTreeViewFilter

    abstract static class ProofTreeViewFilter.NodeFilter
extends ProofTreeViewFilter
    Filters working locally on nodes. There may only be one such filter active at any time.
    Author:
    bruns

    • Method Detail

      • global

        boolean global()
        Description copied from class: ProofTreeViewFilter
        Returns whether the filter's scope is on the whole tree (like hiding subtrees).
        Specified by:
        global in class ProofTreeViewFilter

      • countChild

        public abstract boolean countChild(GUIProofTreeNode child,
                                   TreeNode parent,
                                   int pos)

      • getChildCount

        public int getChildCount(Object parent)

      • getChild

        public Object getChild(Object parent,
                       int index)

      • getIndexOfChild

        public int getIndexOfChild(Object parent,
                           Object child)

      • countChild

        protected boolean countChild(TreeNode child,
                             TreeNode parent,
                             int pos)
        Decides wether a child should be counted while iterating all children. A child should not be counted if intermediate proofsteps are hidden and the child is not the last child, i.e. not an open or closed goal. Used by getChild, getChildCount and getIndexOfChild (implementing TreeModel).
